prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约6511→6115→10024→10101，2024年位次大幅后移约3900名，2025年基本持平于10101名附近，近两年整体后移约4000名，竞争明显加剧；该校在四川理科/物理类计划2022–2024年均为61人，2025年增至71人，2026年计划73人，较2025年小幅扩招约2.8%，扩招幅度有限，对竞争缓解作用不大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第42名（2025年第45名），排名稳中有升，属于国内顶尖财经类院校；2023年声誉评价偏负面（新闻传播学类专业位次大幅下滑），但近年未见明显负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第97、评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现高热关注信号；未见投档断档记录；应用经济学A、理论经济学A-，财经类学科实力突出，与招生专业（金融学类、财政学类、经济学类等）高度匹配，对高分考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业热度2024年呈分化观望态势，较2023年小幅升温；四川省2026年高考总人数约53.5万（较2025年物理类+历史类合计约46.3万增长约15.6%），考生规模显著扩大，竞争压力上升；中央财经大学位于北京，在四川招生占比约3–4%，属跨省招生，无本省倾斜；北京地域对西南考生仍具较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次大幅后移趋势、2026年小幅扩招（+2人）但四川考生总数显著增长（+15.6%）、学校排名稳中有升、财经类专业热度分化观望等因素，预计2026年竞争继续加剧，位次数字进一步增大。预测最低位次约10302名，区间9802–10802名。

一档（最难进）
- 金融科技（北航计算机联培）
- 金融学类（金融工程、金融科技）
- 金融学（含金融学北外英语联培）
- 统计学类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工商管理类（会计学院）
- 财政学类
- 精算学
- 大数据管理与应用（许国志大数据英才班）
- 经济学（数理经济与数理金融）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 计算机类
- 数学类

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间9802–10802名内，建议以二档专业（财政学类、工商管理类（会计学院）、精算学）为主力填报，一档专业（金融科技、金融学类）作为冲刺，三档专业（计算机类、数学类、经济与贸易类）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<9802名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 science/physics category minimum rankings approximately 6511→6115→10024→10101, with a significant backward shift of about 3900 places in 2024, and basically stable around 10101 in 2025, with an overall backward shift of about 4000 places in the past two years, indicating intensified competition; the university's science/physics category plan in Sichuan was 61 students from 2022 to 2024, increased to 71 in 2025, and planned 73 in 2026, a slight expansion of about 2.8% compared to 2025, with limited expansion effect on alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (45th in 2025), with a stable and slightly rising ranking, belonging to the top domestic finance and economics institutions; the 2023 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (significant decline in rankings for journalism and communication majors), but no obvious negative public opinion in recent years; Douyin heat total ranking 97th, rated as 'average', with short video platform exposure at a medium to low level, no high attention signals; no record of enrollment gaps; Applied Economics A, Theoretical Economics A-, with outstanding strength in finance and economics disciplines, highly matching the enrollment majors (finance, fiscal, economics, etc.), with sustained appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of finance/finance/economics majors in 2024 showed a trend of differentiation and wait-and-see, slightly warming compared to 2023; the total number of Sichuan college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is about 535,000 (an increase of about 15.6% compared to the total of about 463,000 for physics and history categories in 2025), with a significant expansion of the candidate pool, increasing competitive pressure; Central University of Finance and Economics is located in Beijing, with about 3–4% of its enrollment in Sichuan, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no local preference; Beijing's location still has strong appeal to southwestern candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift trend in rankings from 2024–2025, the slight expansion in 2026 (+2 students) but the significant increase in Sichuan candidates (+15.6%), the stable and slightly rising school ranking, and the differentiated wait-and-see trend in finance and economics major popularity, competition is expected to continue intensifying in 2026, with ranking numbers further increasing. The predicted minimum ranking is about 10302, with a range of 9802–10802.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Financial Technology (Beihang University Computer Science Joint Training)
- Finance (Financial Engineering, Financial Technology)
- Finance (including Finance and Beijing Foreign Studies University English Joint Training)
- Statistics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Business Administration (Accounting School)
- Fiscal Studies
- Actuarial Science
- Big Data Management and Application (Xu Guozhi Big Data Elite Class)
- Economics (Mathematical Economics and Mathematical Finance).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Computer Science
- Mathematics
- Economics and Trade
- Investment
- Management Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 9802–10802, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Fiscal Studies, Business Administration (Accounting School), Actuarial Science) as the main choices, Tier 1 majors (Financial Technology, Finance) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Computer Science, Mathematics, Economics and Trade) as safe backups. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<9802), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category approximately 816→867→1476→828, with a significant drop to 1476 in 2024 and a strong rebound to 828 in 2025, showing large fluctuations; 2025 baseline approximately 828. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan for liberal arts/history category was 28 students from 2022 to 2024, increased to 31 in 2025, and remains at 31 in 2026, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable and rising ranking, belonging to the top domestic finance and economics institutions; reputation evaluation in 2023 was somewhat negative (significant drop in rankings for Journalism and Communication majors), but rankings have strongly rebounded in 2025, indicating the negative impact has been absorbed; Douyin popularity overall ranking 97th, rated as 'average', without high attention; Applied Economics rated A, Theoretical Economics rated A-, with outstanding strength in finance and economics disciplines, highly matching liberal arts enrollment majors (Finance, Public Finance, Economics, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popularity of finance/accounting/economics majors is divided and cautious, but liberal arts students still have a strong willingness to apply to finance and economics institutions; total number of examinees in Sichuan for the 2026 Gaokao is approximately 535,000, a significant increase from 2025, raising competitive pressure; Central University of Finance and Economics is located in Beijing, recruiting across provinces, and Beijing's region has a strong appeal to liberal arts examinees from Southwest China.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong rebound to 828 in 2025, unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, significant increase in total examinees in Sichuan (+15.6%), and sustained appeal of finance and economics majors to liberal arts students, the ranking in 2026 is expected to slightly decline from the 828 baseline. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 843, with a range of 717–969.
